---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature-request, awaiting-triage
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Description

<!-- Clear and concise description of what you want to add. -->

## 🎯 Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What's the pain point? -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- How should this feature work? Describe the ideal implementation. -->

## 📚 Use Case & Motivation

<!-- Why do you need this feature? Who would benefit? Provide specific examples of how it would be useful. -->

## 🤔 Alternative Solutions

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this problem? What are the pros and cons? -->

## 🎨 Mockups or Examples

<!-- Add any mockups, screenshots, code examples, or diagrams that illustrate your idea. -->

```

```

## 🔗 Related Issues or Features

<!-- Link to any related issues, discussions, or similar features in other tools. -->

## 📋 Additional Context

<!-- Any other information that would help us understand and implement this feature? -->

## ✔️ Pre-submission Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing feature requests to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I've provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I've explained the problem it solves
- [ ] I've included relevant examples or use cases
- [ ] I've checked if there are any alternative solutions
- [ ] I'm not requesting changes to the closed-source code

---

**Thank you for the feature suggestion! We'll review and discuss it with the community.** 🙌
